Good Health and Well-being.reason: Inferred link to mental well-being (Target 3.4) through 'Jungian psychology' and finding 'solutions to life's difficulties from stories'.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops relevant vocational skills (Target 4.4) for the film and television industry.
evidence: 科目名稱：影視寫作 (Course Name: Film & TV Scriptwriting)
認識業界必備的多種敘事結構 (Understand various narrative structures necessary in the industry)

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Prepares students for creative industry jobs (Target 8.3) by teaching skills 'necessary in the industry' and how to 'plan a series that meets the mass market'.
evidence: 認識業界必備的多種敘事結構 (Understand various narrative structures necessary in the industry)
規劃符合大眾市場的影集 (plan a series that meets the mass market)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focuses on innovation and creativity (Target 9.5, 9.b) within the film and television industry, a key creative and industrial sector.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: A minor link to rule of law (Target 16.3) and protecting freedoms (16.10) through the explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and intellectual property rights.
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍 (Respect Copyright. Use legitimate books.)
